scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @tyrum/contracts build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/transport-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/node-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/client build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/cli-utils build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-core build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/operator-ui build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/desktop-node build
scripts.build: pnpm build:main && pnpm build:preload && pnpm build:renderer
scripts.build:gateway: pnpm --filter @tyrum/contracts build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/cli-utils build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/node-sdk build && pnpm --filter @tyrum/gateway build && node ./scripts/stage-gateway-bin.mjs
scripts.dist: pnpm build:gateway && pnpm build && electron-builder --publish never
